title: Laelia × elegans
taxonomy: Laelia × elegans is a hybrid orchid species, resulting from the cross between two species of orchids. It is a member of the genus Laelia, which is a group of orchids within the subtribe Maxillariinae. The species Laelia × elegans is often classified as a synonym of Laelia rubescens, although some sources may still recognize it as a distinct species. Laelia × elegans is native to Mexico and Central America, where it is found in a variety of habitats, including tropical forests and cloud forests. Laelia × elegans is a popular choice among orchid enthusiasts due to its vibrant flowers and relatively easy cultivation.
